selection.rule: Every selected sentence must expose its source metric paths in the snapshot details panel.

conditionLanguage.implementation: Parse; never pass strings to eval or Function.
conditionLanguage.missingValuePolicy: schema validation failure; do not silently coerce to zero

observations.zh-CN: 这一路，你让花大部分时间留在暗处。
observations.en: For most of this route, you kept the flower in the dark.

observations.zh-CN: 世界很少需要回应你的亮度。
observations.en: The world seldom had to answer your brightness.

observations.zh-CN: 你多次回到那段不太亮也不太暗的区间。
observations.en: You returned often to the interval that was neither bright nor dim.

observations.zh-CN: 花保持在中间时，附近有些身体跟着呼吸。
observations.en: When the flower stayed in the middle, nearby bodies breathed with it.

observations.zh-CN: 即使空间变得拥挤，你仍让花保持明亮。
observations.en: Even as the space grew crowded, you kept the flower bright.

observations.zh-CN: 很多东西因为你的光而加快了刷新。
observations.en: Many things refreshed faster because of your light.

observations.zh-CN: 你让花在两端之间来回，世界每次都重新判断。
observations.en: You moved the flower between both ends, and the world judged it anew each time.

observations.zh-CN: 这一路的亮度没有成为一个固定答案。
observations.en: Brightness did not settle into a fixed answer on this route.

observations.zh-CN: 你很少抬头确认那只眼睛。
observations.en: You rarely looked up to confirm the Eye.

observations.zh-CN: 这一路，有很长时间是朝上看的。
observations.en: A long part of this route was spent looking upward.

observations.zh-CN: 花被强制压暗过几次，每次恢复都晚了一点。
observations.en: The flower was forced dim several times; each recovery arrived later.

observations.zh-CN: 你曾把视线停得很久，转身后画面还留在那里。
observations.en: You held your gaze for a long time; the image remained after you turned.

observations.zh-CN: 你反复确认那只眼睛，却没有久留。
observations.en: You checked the Eye repeatedly, but did not remain.

observations.zh-CN: 你看着它，也同时把自己的轮廓收窄。
observations.en: You looked at it while narrowing your own outline.

observations.zh-CN: 至少有一次，读取结束时仍留下空白。
observations.en: At least once, a read ended with a blank interval.

observations.zh-CN: 它记录了你的方向，随后你去了别处。
observations.en: It recorded your direction; afterward, you went elsewhere.

observations.zh-CN: 你的路径很少收窄。
observations.en: Your route rarely narrowed.

observations.zh-CN: 你把许多移动压缩进一条窄线。
observations.en: You compressed much of your movement into a narrow line.

observations.zh-CN: 有二十四次以上，危险从你身边经过，却没有碰到你。
observations.en: More than twenty-four hazards passed beside you without touching.

observations.zh-CN: 这一路没有记录到贴近危险的证据。
observations.en: This route recorded no evidence of close passage beside danger.

observations.zh-CN: 每一份擦身而过的证据都来自不同的弹体。
observations.en: Each piece of near-miss evidence came from a different projectile.

observations.zh-CN: 你多次进入专注，也多次主动离开。
observations.en: You entered focus many times, and left it deliberately many times.

observations.zh-CN: 有几次，你在危险抵达前恢复了宽的移动。
observations.en: Several times, you restored wide movement before danger arrived.

observations.zh-CN: 这一趟收集到的擦身证据都被写进了局部空白。
observations.en: All near-miss evidence gathered here was written into local absences.

observations.zh-CN: 这一路没有打开局部空白。
observations.en: No local absence was opened on this route.

observations.zh-CN: 有一处规则短暂缺席，坐标被留下了。
observations.en: A rule was briefly absent in one place; its coordinates remain.

observations.zh-CN: 几处局部空白在关闭后留下了不同方向的痕迹。
observations.en: Several local absences closed and left traces in different directions.

observations.zh-CN: 有一道痕迹穿过了系统用来校正世界的线。
observations.en: One trace crossed a line the system used to correct the world.

observations.zh-CN: 读取进行时，你让其中一小块区域失效。
observations.en: While a read was underway, you made one small region fail.

observations.zh-CN: 留下的空白朝向不止一边。
observations.en: The absences you left did not point to only one side.

observations.zh-CN: 你离开以后，有一个远处的身体改变了姿势。
observations.en: After you left, one distant body changed its posture.

observations.zh-CN: 反抗留下的痕迹和受伤留下的痕迹，落在不同的地方。
observations.en: The traces of resistance and injury remained in different places.

observations.zh-CN: 你经过了很多信号，其中大部分没有回答。
observations.en: You passed many signals; most of them did not answer.

observations.zh-CN: 你把信息房间照得更亮，它于是刷新得更快。
observations.en: You brightened the information room, and it refreshed faster.

observations.zh-CN: 这一路有很长一段被分成左右两边。
observations.en: A long part of this route was divided into left and right.

observations.zh-CN: 两套系统都读过你，但留下的记录并不相同。
observations.en: Two systems read you, and left different records.

observations.zh-CN: 你在一个只允许开或关的地方停留得最久。
observations.en: You stayed longest in a place that allowed only on or off.

observations.zh-CN: 四种房间都在这一路出现过。
observations.en: All four kinds of room appeared on this route.

observations.zh-CN: 你回到过已经离开的精神状态。
observations.en: You returned to mental states you had already left.

observations.zh-CN: 房间多次跨过阈值，而你没有一直停在同一侧。
observations.en: The rooms crossed many thresholds while you did not remain on one side.

observations.zh-CN: 你的行走集中在一条很窄的带状区域。
observations.en: Your movement stayed inside a very narrow band.

observations.zh-CN: 你的路径碰到了这个空间的大部分宽度。
observations.en: Your route touched most of the width of this space.

observations.zh-CN: 你在两边之间停留的时间，比在任一边都更长。
observations.en: You spent longer between the two sides than on either side.

observations.zh-CN: 你多次越过那条要求站队的线。
observations.en: You crossed the line that demanded a side several times.

observations.zh-CN: 你曾离开两边，随后被送回裂缝边缘。
observations.en: You left both sides once, and were returned to the edge of the crack.

observations.zh-CN: 两套规则同时存在时，你在它们的交集里停了六秒。
observations.en: While both rules remained, you stayed in their intersection for six seconds.

observations.zh-CN: 两个月亮没有对齐时，你穿过了未被认领的缝。
observations.en: While the two moons disagreed, you crossed the unclaimed seam.

observations.zh-CN: 这条路径足够长，下一次会被完整地走过一遍。
observations.en: This route was long enough to be walked through once more next time.

observations.zh-CN: 静电删掉了一些表面，过后留下了迟一拍的字符。
observations.en: Static deleted parts of surfaces and left characters one refresh behind.

observations.zh-CN: 雨停后，地面保留了一会儿最后出现的字符。
observations.en: After the rain, the ground kept its last characters for a while.

observations.zh-CN: 灰烬沿着你刚才走过的地方沉降。
observations.en: Ash settled along the places you had just crossed.

observations.zh-CN: 风停以后，一条电缆和一道阴影较晚才归位。
observations.en: After the wind, one cable and one shadow returned late.

observations.zh-CN: 墨盘经过天空时，一栋建筑没有完全恢复。
observations.en: When the ink disk crossed the sky, one building did not fully return.

observations.zh-CN: 蚀发生时，有些身体没有继续看天，而是转向了你。
observations.en: During the eclipse, some bodies stopped looking upward and turned toward you.

observations.zh-CN: 附近的电缆几次把你的亮度送往远处。
observations.en: Nearby cables sent your brightness away several times.

observations.zh-CN: 日落之前，建筑已经两次试着画出你。
observations.en: Before dusk, the buildings had already tried twice to draw you.

observations.zh-CN: 这一路在身体停下的位置结束，那里留下了一道受力方向。
observations.en: This route ended where the body stopped; a direction of impact remains there.

observations.zh-CN: 协议在规定的时间之后自行撤回。
observations.en: The protocol withdrew after its allotted interval.

observations.zh-CN: 读取完成了，但没有准确预告你接下来的移动。
observations.en: The read completed, but did not predict your following movement.

observations.zh-CN: 两个主张都没有消失，你在它们之间留下了一段稳定时间。
observations.en: Neither claim disappeared; you left a stable interval between them.

observations.zh-CN: 世界的单一校正线在一道真实坐标上中断。
observations.en: The world's single correction line broke at a recorded coordinate.

observations.zh-CN: 画面没有呈现黄昏，声音却完成了下降。
observations.en: The image did not represent dusk, though the sound completed its descent.

observations.zh-CN: 读取账本关闭时，仍有一段没有被分类。
observations.en: When the read ledger closed, one interval remained unclassified.

observations.zh-CN: 上一条路径已经烧尽，只在终点留下了一小块材料。
observations.en: The previous route has burned out, leaving a small material remainder at its end.
